goal: Create models.py with a Bookmark dataclass that has fields: id (str, uuid4 default), url (str), title (str), tags (list[str], default empty list), created_at (datetime, default now). Also create a BookmarkStore class that stores bookmarks in a JSON file. The constructor takes a file_path parameter (default 'bookmarks.json'). Include a _load() method that reads from the file (returns empty list if file doesn't exist) and a _save(bookmarks) method that writes the list to file. Use dataclasses and include type hints throughout.
verify: python3 -c 'from models import Bookmark, BookmarkStore; b=Bookmark(url="https://example.com", title="Test"); assert b.url=="https://example.com"; assert b.tags==[]; assert b.id; print("models OK")'
